{{Infobox group
| name = Kazan clan
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Kazan clan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Kazan]] clan is a prominent group within [[Sacred Valley]], known for their aggressive maneuvering and distinct martial culture. They are characterized by a heavy emphasis on armor; every member of the clan, including women and children, wears protective gear such as mail-lined dresses, helmets, or small breastplates. Their identity is further marked by large copper or [[Iron{{!}}iron]] badges worn over the chest and banners featuring three [[stone]] dogs. During major events like the [[Seven-Year Festival]], they make a grand entrance accompanied by trumpets and advancing armies that cause the ground to tremble. In terms of political standing, the [[Kazan]] have faced a decline in influence, with some observers suggesting they are no longer among the top ten families in the valley. Despite this, they remain active competitors against the [[Li]] and Wei clans. Their territory is protected by sturdy walls made of large bricks and bronze gates reinforced with precious metals. The clan's leadership includes a [[Jai Patriarch{{!}}Patriarch]], described as a stocky, bearded man who wears a bear's pelt and chainmail. While they have been viewed by rivals as blunt or lacking subtlety, the [[Kazan]] have demonstrated significant combat capability and loyalty, particularly when defending allies against external threats.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Kazan clan]] is maneuvering aggressively for a [[Wei clan]] farm by the river.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Kazan clan]]'s color in the arena is brown and red.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Kazan clan{{!}}Kazan Clan]] contains [[Irons]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Kazan clan]] has members serving as sentries in the camp.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1">''Uncrowned'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] is a group [[Lindon]] needs to visit.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] is located to the west of the valley.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] has a territory with walls made of large bricks mortared by old [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]]'s gates are hammered bronze lined with [[halfsilver]] or [[Goldsteel{{!}}goldsteel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] is led by a [[Jai Patriarch{{!}}Patriarch]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] has a large territory and uses alarms of war and riders to gather.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] participated in the [[Seven-Year Festival]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] uses boundary fields.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] was caught off-guard by the sky turning gold.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] is not from the [[Kazan clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[sacred artists]] were members of the [[Kazan clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] is buried.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] reached the base of [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Ziel of the Wasteland{{!}}Ziel]] and the [[Kazan clan]] reached [[Heaven's Glory]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The young [[sacred artists]] on the stage are from the Wei and [[Kazan]] clans.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Kazan clan]] is no longer among the top ten families in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“The Kazan in particular are maneuvering aggressively for one of our farms by the river.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“You’re not from the Kazan clan!” Elder Rahm shouted.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
